description: Default English translations for DeepSeek TUI

translations.onboarding_language_subtitle: Pick the UI language. You can change it any time with `/settings set locale <tag>`.
translations.onboarding_language_footer: Press 1-5 to choose, or Enter to keep the current setting
translations.onboarding_language_auto_detected: We've automatically detected your system language.
translations.onboarding_language_change_hint_1: You can change it anytime by typing naturally
translations.onboarding_language_change_hint_2: (e.g., "I want to use Chinese") or with
translations.onboarding_press_keys_to_choose: Press 1-5 to choose, or Enter to keep the current setting
translations.cmd_attach_description: Attach image/video media; use @path for text files or directories
translations.cmd_cache_description: Show DeepSeek prefix-cache hit/miss stats for the last N turns
translations.cmd_compact_description: Trigger context compaction to free up space (legacy; v0.6.6 prefers cycle restart)
translations.cmd_cycle_description: Show the carry-forward briefing for a specific cycle
translations.cmd_cycles_description: List checkpoint-restart cycle handoffs in this session
translations.cmd_diff_description: Show file changes since session start
translations.cmd_edit_description: Revise and resubmit the last message
translations.cmd_home_description: Show home dashboard with stats and quick actions
translations.cmd_goal_description: Set a session goal with optional token budget
translations.cmd_lsp_description: Toggle LSP diagnostics on or off
translations.cmd_share_description: Export current session as a shareable web URL
translations.cmd_jobs_description: Inspect and control background shell jobs
translations.cmd_links_description: Show DeepSeek dashboard and docs links
translations.cmd_logout_description: Clear API key and return to setup
translations.cmd_memory_description: Inspect or manage the persistent user-memory file
translations.cmd_note_description: Append note to persistent notes file (.deepseek/notes.md)
translations.cmd_plan_description: Switch to plan mode and review suggested implementation steps
translations.cmd_provider_description: Switch or view the active LLM backend (deepseek | nvidia-nim)
translations.cmd_recall_description: Search prior cycle archives (BM25 over message text)
translations.cmd_restore_description: Roll back the workspace to a prior pre/post-turn snapshot. With no arg, lists recent snapshots.
translations.cmd_review_description: Run a structured code review on a file, diff, or PR
translations.cmd_rlm_description: Recursive Language Model (RLM) turn — store the prompt in a Python REPL and let the model write code to process it, with `llm_query()` / `sub_rlm()` for sub-LLM calls.
translations.cmd_skill_description: Activate a skill, or install/update/uninstall/trust a community skill
translations.cmd_skills_description: List local skills (or --remote to browse the curated registry)
translations.cmd_stash_description: Park or restore a composer draft (Ctrl+S to push, /stash list/pop)
translations.cmd_statusline_description: Configure which items appear in the footer
translations.cmd_swarm_description: Run a multi-agent fanout turn (sequential | mixture | distill | deliberate)
translations.cmd_trust_description: Manage workspace trust and per-path allowlist (`/trust add <path>`, `/trust list`, `/trust on|off`)
translations.cmd_cache_advice:
Hit/miss ratios over ~70% after the third turn indicate a stable cache prefix; 
lower than that on long sessions suggests prefix churn worth investigating (#263).
translations.cmd_cache_footnote: * miss inferred from input − hit when the provider did not report it explicitly.
translations.cmd_cache_no_data:
Cache history: no turns recorded yet.

DeepSeek surfaces `prompt_cache_hit_tokens` / `prompt_cache_miss_tokens` on every API turn that the model supports it (V4 family). Run a turn and try /cache again.
translations.cmd_cache_totals: Σ in: {sum_in}   Σ hit: {sum_hit}   Σ miss: {sum_miss}   avg hit ratio: {avg}
translations.cmd_cost_report:
Session Cost:
─────────────────────────────
Approx total spent: ${cost}

Cost estimates are approximate and use provider usage telemetry when available.

DeepSeek API Pricing:
─────────────────────────────
Pricing details are not configured in this CLI.
translations.kb_scroll_transcript: Scroll transcript, navigate input history, or select composer attachments
translations.kb_jump_top_bottom: Jump to top / bottom of transcript
translations.kb_jump_top_bottom_empty: Jump to top / bottom (when input is empty)
translations.kb_jump_line_start_end: Jump to start / end of line
translations.kb_delete_char: Delete character before / after the cursor, or remove selected attachment
translations.kb_stash_draft: Stash the current draft (`/stash pop` to restore)
translations.kb_search_history: Search prompt history and recover local drafts
translations.kb_insert_newline: Insert a newline in the composer
translations.kb_close_menu: Close menu, cancel request, discard draft, or clear input
translations.kb_cancel_or_exit: Cancel request, or exit when idle
translations.kb_shell_controls: Open shell controls for a running foreground command
translations.kb_fuzzy_file_picker: Open the fuzzy file picker (insert @path on Enter)
translations.kb_last_message_pager: Open pager for the last message (when input is empty)
translations.kb_selected_details: Open details for the selected tool or message (when input is empty)
translations.kb_backtrack_message: Backtrack to a previous user message (Left/Right step, Enter to rewind)
translations.kb_complete_cycle_modes: Complete /command, queue running-turn follow-up, cycle modes; Shift+Tab cycles reasoning effort
translations.kb_jump_plan_agent_yolo: Jump directly to Plan / Agent / YOLO mode
translations.kb_alt_jump_plan_agent_yolo: Alternative jump to Plan / Agent / YOLO mode
translations.kb_focus_sidebar: Focus Plan / Todos / Tasks / Agents / Auto sidebar
translations.kb_toggle_plan_agent: Toggle between Plan and Agent modes
translations.kb_paste_attach: Paste text or attach a clipboard image
translations.kb_copy_selection: Copy the current selection (Cmd+C on macOS)
translations.kb_context_menu: Open context actions for paste, selection, message details, context, and help
translations.kb_attach_path: Add a local text file or directory to context
translations.kb_help_overlay: Open this help overlay (when input is empty)
translations.clear_conversation_busy: Conversation cleared (plan state busy; run /clear again if needed)
translations.links_tip: Tip: API keys are available in the dashboard console.
translations.home_agent_mode_tip: Agent mode - Use tools for autonomous tasks
translations.home_agent_mode_review_tip: Use Ctrl+X to review in Plan mode before executing
translations.home_agent_mode_yolo_tip: Type /yolo to enable full tool access
translations.home_yolo_mode_tip: YOLO mode - Full tool access, no approvals
translations.doctor_api_key_hint: Run 'deepseek auth set --provider <name>' to save a key to ~/.deepseek/config.toml.
translations.doctor_invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Check your DEEPSEEK_API_KEY or config.toml
translations.doctor_env_key_rejected: The rejected key came from DEEPSEEK_API_KEY; no saved config key is present.
translations.doctor_save_config_key_hint: Run `deepseek auth set --provider deepseek` to save a config key that overrides stale env.
translations.doctor_permission_denied: API key lacks permissions. Verify key is active at platform.deepseek.com
translations.doctor_timeout_error: Connection timed out. Check your network connection
translations.doctor_dns_error: DNS resolution failed. Check your network connection
translations.doctor_connection_error: Connection failed. Check firewall settings or try again
translations.doctor_tools_setup_hint: Run `deepseek-tui setup --tools` to scaffold a starter dir.
translations.doctor_plugins_setup_hint: Run `deepseek-tui setup --plugins` to scaffold a starter dir.
translations.doctor_composer_stash: · composer stash empty (Ctrl+S in the composer to park a draft)
translations.onboarding_welcome_description: A focused terminal workspace for longer model sessions.
translations.onboarding_welcome_steps: You'll add an API key, review trust for this directory, and then land in the chat.
translations.onboarding_welcome_composer: The main composer is multi-line, so you can write full prompts instead of squeezing everything into one line.
translations.onboarding_api_key_step1: Step 1.  Open https://platform.deepseek.com/api_keys and create a key.
translations.onboarding_api_key_step2: Step 2.  Paste it below and press Enter.
translations.onboarding_api_key_saved_to: Saved to ~/.deepseek/config.toml so it works from any folder.
translations.onboarding_api_key_paste_exact: Paste the full key exactly as issued (no spaces or newlines).
translations.onboarding_api_key_instructions: Press Enter to save, Esc to go back.
translations.onboarding_trust_question: Allow DeepSeek to access files outside this workspace?
translations.onboarding_trust_yes_explanation: Y = let reviews, searches, and agents reach outside this workspace when a task needs it.
translations.onboarding_trust_no_explanation: N = keep file access scoped to this workspace and review approvals case by case.
translations.sidebar_plan_hint: Use /plan or the update_plan tool to create a plan.
translations.popup_choose_after_plan: Choose what should happen after this plan.
translations.popup_option_accept_and_proceed_desc: Start implementation in Agent mode with approvals
translations.popup_option_revise_plan_desc: Ask follow-ups or request plan changes
translations.popup_option_exit_plan_mode_desc: Return to Agent mode without implementation
translations.popup_mcp_config_exists: MCP config already exists at {} (use /mcp init --force to overwrite)
translations.setup_mcp_next_step: Next: edit the file, then run `deepseek mcp list` or `deepseek mcp tools`.
translations.setup_skills_local_enabled: Local skills dir enabled for this workspace: {}
translations.setup_skills_next_step: Next: run the TUI and use `/skills` then `/skill getting-started`.
translations.setup_tools_next_step: Next: drop scripts here; surface them via skills/MCP when ready.
translations.setup_plugins_next_step: Next: copy the example dir, edit PLUGIN.md, wire via skill/MCP.
translations.setup_sandbox_unavailable: · Sandbox not available on this platform (best-effort only).
translations.mcp_config_exists: MCP config already exists at {} (use --force to overwrite)
translations.mcp_edit_hint: Edit the file, then run `deepseek mcp list` or `deepseek mcp tools`.
translations.mcp_connected_all: Connected to all configured MCP servers.
translations.cli_status_api_key_missing: api_key: missing  (set {env_var} or `[providers.{provider}].api_key` in ~/.deepseek/config.toml; or run `{login_hint}`)
translations.cli_status_doctor_json_hint: Run `deepseek-tui doctor --json` for a machine-readable check.
translations.cli_dotenv_missing_with_example: .env not present in workspace (run `cp .env.example .env` and edit)
translations.cli_clean_nothing_no_dir: Nothing to clean - checkpoints dir does not exist: {path}
translations.cli_clean_nothing_no_files: Nothing to clean - no checkpoint files in {path}
translations.cli_clean_would_remove: Would remove {count} checkpoint file(s) (use --force to apply):
translations.cli_models_empty: No models returned by the API.
translations.cli_sessions_more: {count} more session(s). Use --limit to show more.
translations.cli_init_agents_edit_hint: Edit this file to customize how the AI agent works with your project.
translations.cli_init_agents_loaded_hint: The instructions will be loaded automatically when you run deepseek.
translations.cli_auth_no_api_key_arg: No API key provided. Pass --api-key or pipe one via stdin.
translations.cli_auth_no_api_key_stdin: No API key provided via stdin.
translations.cli_session_input_prompt: Enter a number (or press Enter to cancel):
translations.cli_apply_no_patch: No patch file provided and stdin is empty.
translations.cmd_attach_unsupported: Unsupported attachment type. /attach is for image/video paths; use @path for text files or directories.
translations.cmd_queue_tip: Tip: /queue edit <n> to edit, /queue drop <n> to remove
translations.cmd_queue_already_editing: Already editing a queued message. Send it or /queue clear to discard.
translations.cmd_queue_editing_message: Editing queued message {index} (press Enter to re-queue/send)
translations.cmd_queue_missing_index: Missing index. Usage: /queue edit <n> or /queue drop <n>
translations.cmd_queue_index_positive: Index must be a positive number
translations.cmd_goal_empty_help:
No goal set. Use /goal <objective> [budget: N] to set one.
/goal clear - remove the current goal.
